📜
Executive Order No. 280 — Senior-Friendly State
NC Governor formally designated North Carolina a “Senior-Friendly State” — directing three key mandates:
Caregiving Workforce: Grow the caregiving workforce to meet rising senior care demand
Programs & Services: Expand programs and services for older adults
Senior Transportation: Invest in transportation for older adults statewide
